allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);d=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else [d];[print\('  inst=',\(i.get\('instance',i\) if isinstance\(i.get\('instance',i\),dict\) else {}\).get\('instanceName'\) or i.get\('name'\),'| state=',\(i.get\('instance',i\) if isinstance\(i.get\('instance',i\),dict\) else {}\).get\('connectionStatus'\) or i.get\('connectionStatus'\)\) for i in d]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json,re;[print\(c['id'],c['phone'],'<-- suspeito' if not re.match\(r'^55\\d{10,11}$',c['phone']\) else ''\) for c in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json,re;rows=json.load\(sys.stdin\);junk=[c for c in rows if not re.match\(r'^55\\d{10,11}$',c['phone']\)];print\('restantes:',len\(rows\),'| lixo:',[c['phone'] for c in junk] or 'NENHUM'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json;[print\(c['phone'],'| tn=',c['tenancy_id'],'|',c['last_message_at']\) for c in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json;[print\('phone=',c['phone'],'| nome=',c['contact_name'],'|',c['triage_classification']\) for c in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\('total:',len\(d\)\); [print\(' -', {k:u[k] for k in u if k in \('display_name','role','active','email'\)}\) for u in d[:6]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json;r=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\('inserido id=',r[0]['id'][:8],'role=',r[0]['role']\) if isinstance\(r,list\) and r else print\('ERRO:',r\)")
